scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'scripts/stage-bun-tasks && tsc -p tsconfig.bun-tasks.json; status=$?; scripts/stage-bun-tasks clean; exit $status'
scripts.lint: sh -c 'scripts/stage-bun-tasks && oxlint tmp/bun-tasks; status=$?; scripts/stage-bun-tasks clean; exit $status'
scripts.format: sh -c 'scripts/stage-bun-tasks && oxfmt --write tmp/bun-tasks && scripts/stage-bun-tasks unstage; status=$?; scripts/stage-bun-tasks clean; exit $status'
scripts.format:check: sh -c 'scripts/stage-bun-tasks && oxfmt --check tmp/bun-tasks; status=$?; scripts/stage-bun-tasks clean; exit $status'
